visual_description: A man in a pink plaid shirt sits on a couch, facing another man in a blue plaid shirt who stands near a doorway marked "232." The standing man looks down briefly, then turns slightly toward the seated man, who gestures with his hand while speaking. A framed picture and wall-mounted lamps are visible in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable background noise or inflection.
